drawerSubtitle: Deji hal mar · Wuxuu cusbooneysiiyaa xisaabaadka muddada iyo gubashada
balanceDescription: Lacagta aad hadda gacanta ku haysato — akoonnada bangiga, kaydinta, lacag yar. Tani waxay wadaa xisaabinta muddadaada.
balanceSetRunway: Muddadaada waxaa dib loogu xisaabin doonaa qiimahan.
fixedDescription: Kharashaadka bil kasta isku mid ah iyadoo aan loo eegin dakhliga. Kuwan waxaa laga jaraa faa'iidada guud si loo xisaabiyo faa'iidada saafiga ah iyo heerka gubashada maalinlaha ah.
variableDescription: Kharashaadka la kordha tirooyinkaaga — komishannada, rarista, kharashka xayeysiinta. Kuwan waxaa loo isticmaalaa falanqaynta faa'iidada wax-ku-darka.
